$comment: BD-FIXTURES — GROUND TRUTH for the DETERMINISTIC corpus analyzer (release-spec §1.1/§1.2; the analysis is auditable stats with NO LLM — RD-2). A test runs the analyzer over the fixture corpora (own + 2 competitors, from corpora/acme-cosmos/ or the replayed scrape-responses.json — both yield this) and asserts these stats. Counts are exact and hand-verifiable from the 16 fixture items (8 own + 4 + 4 competitor). `archetype` uses the production 14-archetype taxonomy (HOW_TO added for this consumer-how-to brand). `engagement` lift = archetype median metric / account median metric (>1.0 over-performs; the §2.6 deterministic pattern). zone_u_only on competitors marks them untrusted (RD-8). ALL SYNTHETIC. See PROVENANCE.md.
schema_note: Not bound to a published schema in this batch — it is the analyzer's expected OUTPUT shape, asserted field-by-field. The analyzer module + its output schema land in a sibling engine batch.

top_first_lines: Three minutes to a sharp Moon, every time:
Introducing the ST-1 first-light walkthrough in the app.
First time my kid found Saturn's rings on their own.

engagement.baseline_note: lift = archetype median bookmarks / own-account median bookmarks. Own account median bookmarks = 475.

competitor_takeaways.recommendation: ANTI-PATTERN — do not adopt; conflicts with drama_dial low

competitor_takeaways.pattern: numbered how-to steps with a named payoff
competitor_takeaways.recommendation: CONFIRMS own how-to strength; borrow the PATTERN (numbered steps + payoff), never the wording
